calculateTotalPrice(BigDecimal, Integer) - Method in class com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.booking.BookingService
Calculates the total price for a booking based on the ticket price and quantity.
cancelBooking(Long) - Method in class com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.booking.BookingController
Deletes a booking by its ID, effectively canceling the booking.
cancelPayment(Long) - Method in class com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.payment.PaymentController
Cancels a payment by its ID.

Defines a bean for CORS configuration, allowing cross-origin requests from specified origins, with allowed methods, headers, and credentials settings.

Creates a new booking for a user and event with the specified quantity of tickets.

Creates a new booking for a user and event with the specified quantity of tickets.

Creates a new payment for a given booking.
